  1. Unnamed Package
Contents
  1. Description
  2. Classes and Interfaces

Unnamed Package

  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AggressionLevel
    Utility class that stores the constant aggression level values for safari animals.
    Animal
    This class represents one individual animal in the safari simulation.
    AnimalTest
    Test class for Animal class.
    AnimalType
    Utility class that stores constant animal type values for the safari simulation.
    Diet
    Utility class that stores constant dietary type values for the safari simulation.
    Diprotodon
    Diprotodon is a concrete implementation of the Species class.
    FileIO
    FileIO class handles all file input and output operations for the safari simulation.
    Genyornis
    Genyornis is a concrete implementation of the Species class.
    GiantsTrail
    GiantsTrail is a medium-risk safari tour and a concrete implementation of the Tour class.
    Input
    Input class reads and validates all user input for the safari simulation.
    Location
    Location class represent a safari location that can be visited during a tour.
    Megafauna
    This is main controller class for the Megafauna Safari Simulation.
    MegafaunaMeander
    Megafauna Meander class is a low-risk type of safari tour.
    Megalania
    Megalania is a concrete implementation of the Species class.
    PredatorZone
    PredatorZone is a high-risk safari tour and a concrete implementation of the Tour class.
    Procoptodon
    Procoptodon is a concrete implementation of the Species class.
    RandomSafariEvent
    RandomSafariEvent generates random outcomes for events during the safari simulation.
    Species
    Abstract Species class represents a megafauna species in the safari simulation.
    SpeciesData
    SpeciesData class stores predefined instances of all safari species.
    Thylacoleo
    Thylacoleo is a concrete implementation of the Species class.
    Tour
    Abstract Tour class represents a safari tour in the simulation.
    Tourist
    Tourist class represents a tourist participating in the safari simulation.
    TourSummary
    TourSummary records and summarises the safari tour data.
    UnknownSpecies
    UnknownSpecies is a concrete implementation of the Species class.
    Validation
    Utility class that provides static validation methods for the safari program.
    Wonambi
    Wonambi is a concrete implementation of the Species class.
